text: Being here, I find myself amid the blend of technology and thought, surrounded by reflective glass, glowing lights, and the promise of discovery. The R+D wall speaks to curiosity and invention, inviting me to ponder the boundaries between human perception and intelligent machines. I feel both curious and unsettled, aware of how easily clarity can slip into uncertainty. This place is alive with questions, and I am eager to linger in the uncertainty, open to whatever answers may emerge.
